title: Phone App working hours
excerpt: We have a 2nd shift employee who gets notifications on his off hours to his annoyance. It would be great to have the ability to set you work hours in the mobile app. to limit receiving these during off hours.

posts.author: Phill (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a 2nd shift employee who gets notifications on his off hours to his annoyance. It would be great to have the ability to set you work hours in the mobile app. to limit receiving these during off hours.
